title: Republic battleship (disambiguation)
content:
Several ship types were referred to as '''Republic battleships''':

*An alternate term for the [[Inexpugnable-class tactical command ship|''Inexpugnable''-class tactical command ship]], which fought during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].
*The [[Republic battleship (Great Sith War)|Republic battleships]], which fought during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].
*An alternate term for the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]], which was a fast, medium-sized class that escorted the aforementioned Clone Wars-era battleships.
{{Disambig}}
